← Streams

OAuth Token Generator

Generate YouTube + Drive refresh token
Token ini include scope:
• YouTube (buat live broadcast)
• Google Drive file (buat upload thumbnail)
⚠ Kalau lo sudah punya token lama, perlu generate baru karena scope bertambah.
1. Masukkan Credentials
2. Exchange Code
3. Token Siap
Google Cloud Credentials
Cara dapat credentials:
1. Buka console.cloud.google.com
2. APIs & Services → Credentials
3. OAuth 2.0 Client IDs → pilih/buat "Web application"
4. Pastikan Google Drive API sudah di-enable
5. Tambah Authorized redirect URI:
https://aksarastream.ddns.net/oauth-helper
